scripts.test:services: tsc --module commonjs --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir dist/service-build src/services/ai/service.test.ts && node dist/service-build/services/ai/service.test.js
scripts.demo:services: tsc --module commonjs --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir dist/service-build src/services/ai/serviceDemo.ts && node dist/service-build/services/ai/serviceDemo.js
